Off Calendar Nov-26-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Avid Alavi for Bertha Juong (Administrator)
Allison Bellumori for Assignee via CourtCall

Ms. Alavi stated she has no opposition to Assignee's entitlement as they did find the individuals. Ms. Bellumori stated that she is confident there are no twins, that Gaudy/Georgia/Gordon is one individual with different names but the birthdate has been consistent. The matter was taken under submission subject to review of the order regarding distribution rights; assignment not at issue.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: A. Santiago. Not reported.

Off Calendar Jan-23-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Avid Alavi for Bertha Joung.
Verleana Green appeared by telephone for Louzola Jenkins.
Allison Bellumori appeared by telephone for Brandenburger & Davis.

Ms. Green stated that her Client has passed away, that her petition is not alive at this point, and that she is not sure if her Client's Heirs or Beneficiaries will want to bring something in the future. The Petition for Suspension of Powers and Removal of Bertha Joung, etc. is off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
